news.title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
news.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX went public this week. The company has a long and complicated relationship with Google. The two companies were both celebrating this week's IPO.

news.title: U.S. peace deal with Iran in question as Israel strikes Lebanon
news.summary: An initial deal to end the war and open the Strait of Hormuz was expected to be signed this week. The deal is expected to include an end to the Iran-Iraq war and the opening of the Strait.

news.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
news.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

news.title: Trump heads to G7 summit in France as world awaits Iran deal
news.summary: The G7 is also likely to address Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe. The Iran war has drawn the world's focus, but the G7 will also address the Ukraine war.

news.title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway
news.summary: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold. JetBlue: "We're going to continue to do what's best for our customers and our company"

news.title: We thought we found the perfect luxury retirement community, but it’s millions of dollars in debt. Are we trapped?
news.summary: “If we were to leave, we would lose a portion of our buy-in — about $80,000,” he says.

news.title: ‘This would be a one-time event’: How can I take extra money from my 401(k) without triggering higher Medicare premiums?
news.summary: “I generally withdraw money from my traditional 401(k) for projects, larger expenses and sometimes just to stay ahead on upcoming bills,” she says.

news.title: Defaults in debt markets are starting again, warns Pimco. Here’s the bond giant’s game plan.
news.summary: Pimco: Investors should increasingly seek out fixed income to anchor portfolios. Equity valuations look stretched, says Pimco. Investors should look to fixed income as an anchor for their portfolios.

news.title: SpaceX shows investors still want moonshots. The Fed may test that theory this week.
news.summary: The AI growth story that’s been powering the bull market harder to justify. Higher interest rates could make the AI story that's been powering it harder to justifying.

news.title: My husband won’t sell his home so we can live together full time. Is this a red flag after a decade of marriage?
news.summary: “Our homes are 20 miles apart, and he still drives back and forth almost daily,” she says of her husband. “Our home is 20 miles from each other, but we live in the same town.”
